description: Style NoteElevate your style to become the envy of the fashion crowd with this multi-strand toniq necklace. Clash them with your season essentials (preferably tonal pastels) for a unique twist. Product DetailsEight strands of small blue beads culminating in gold ring and wide bead detail, which then links to a gold coloured chainHas a rounded lobster clasp closureMaterial and CarePlastic, metalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 80 cm
